label: Adjustment for amortisation of intangible assets
label_normalized: adjustment for amortisation of intangible assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for amortisation expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Decrease Increase In Contract Assets
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease increase in contract assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in contract assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Decrease Increase In Inventories
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease increase in inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  adjustments for decrease (increase) in inventories to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Decrease Increase In Trade And Other Receivables
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease increase in trade and other receivables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  adjustments for decrease (increase) in trade and other current receivables to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustment for depreciation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for depreciation expense to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Dividend income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for dividend income to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Finance Costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for finance cost which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for interest income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for finance income which is income that were derived from the entity's financial assets to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustment on fair value of investment properties
label_normalized: adjustment on fair value of investment properties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for the changes in fair value of investment properties to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.Fair value of the investment properties is the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date. Investment properties are property (land or a building—or part of a building—or both) held (by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease) to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, rather than for:(a) use in the production or supply of goods or services or foradministrative purposes; or(b) sale in the ordinary course of business.

label: Adjustments For Increase Decrease In Trade And Other Payables
label_normalized: adjustments for increase decrease in trade and other payables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  adjustments for increase (decrease) in trade and other current payables to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Interest Income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for interest income to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Total adjustments to reconcile surplus (deficit)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of adjustments to reconcile profit or loss.

label: Adjustments for equity settled share-based payment transactions
label_normalized: adjustments for equity settled share-based payment transactions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share-based payments to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments For Undistributed Profits Of Associates
label_normalized: adjustments for undistributed profits of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for undistributed profits of associates which are entities over which the investor has significant influence to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Administrative Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of administrative expenses which are expenses of providing management and administration for the business.

label: Aircraft
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of aeroplanes, helicopters, or other machines capable of flight.

label: Amortisation Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortisation expenses. Amortisation is the systematic allocation of depreciable amounts of intangible assets over their useful lives.

label: Amount payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts payable to related parties.

label: Amount receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, for amounts receivable from related parties.

label: Amounts Removed From Equity And Adjusted Against Fair Value Of Financial Assets On Reclassification Out Of Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Measurement Category Before Tax
label_normalized: amounts removed from equity and adjusted against fair value of financial assets on reclassification out of fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amounts removed from equity and adjusted against fair value of financial assets on reclassification out of fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category, before tax.

label: Amounts Removed From Equity And Adjusted Against Fair Value Of Financial Assets On Reclassification Out Of Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Measurement Category Net Of Tax
label_normalized: amounts removed from equity and adjusted against fair value of financial assets on reclassification out of fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amounts removed from equity and adjusted against fair value of financial assets on reclassification out of fair value through other comprehensive income measurement category, net of tax.

label: Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of assets held by the reporting entity.Assets are resources:a. controlled by an entity as a result of past events; andb. from which future economic benefits are expected to flow to the entity.

label: Associates Member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the  associates. An associate is an entity over which the investor has significant influence.

label: Auditors Remuneration
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of auditor's remuneration paid.

label: Auditors Remuneration For Audit Services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for audit services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

label: Auditors Remuneration For Other Services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of auditor's remuneration for other services. Auditor's remuneration is the total amount paid to or receivable by the auditors as remuneration for their services as auditors, inclusive of all fees, percentages or other payments or consideration given by or from the reporting entity or by or from any subsidiary of the reporting entity.

label: Balances with Licensed Banks
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash held in accounts with licensed banks.

label: Bank overdraft
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of secured debit balances of the current account.

label: Other banking arrangements
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other banking arrangements not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Basic Earnings Loss Per Share
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total basic earnings per share in the statement of profit or loss and other comprehensive income for:a. Profit or loss from continuing operations attributable to the ordinary shareholders of the parent entity; andb. Profit or loss attributable to the ordinary shareholders of the parent entity for the period for each class of ordinary shares that has a different right to share in profit for the period.

label: Basic Earnings Loss Per Share From Continuing Operations
label_normalized: basic earnings loss per share from continuing operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of basic earnings per share in the statement of profit or loss and other comprehensive income for:a. Profit or loss from continuing operations attributable to the ordinary shareholders of the parent entity; andb. Profit or loss attributable to the ordinary shareholders of the parent entity for the period for each class of ordinary shares that has a different right to share in profit for the period.

label: Basic Earnings Loss Per Share From Discontinued Operations
label_normalized: basic earnings loss per share from discontinued operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the basic amounts per share for the discontinued operation either in the statement of profit or loss and other comprehensive income or in the notes for entities that reports a discontinued operation.

label: Bearer Plants
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of living plants that:a. is used in the production or supply of agricultural produce;b. is expected to bear produce for more than one period; andc. has a remote likelihood of being sold as agricultural produce, except for incidental scrap sales.

label: Total biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

label: Borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay.

label: Brand Names
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of name given by the maker to a product or range of products, especially a trademark.

label: Gross brokerage and other charges
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from gross brokerage and other charges, which are the amount of commissions generated by brokers or registered representatives over a specific period.

label: Total buildings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of buildings.

label: Capital Reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

label: Capital Reserve Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the reserves for long-term capital investment projects or other large and anticipated expenses that will be incurred in the future.

label: Cash
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash.

label: Cash Advances And Loans Made To Other Parties Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: cash advances and loans made to other parties classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of cash advances and loans made to other parties (other than advances and loans of a financial institution) which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
label_normalized: cash and cash equivalents at end of period
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash comprising of cash on hand and demand deposits and cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Cash Equivalents
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of cash equivalents.

label: Proceed from disposal of subsidiary
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from obtaining or losing control of subsidiaries or other businesses which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash Flows From Used In Financing Activities
label_normalized: cash flows from used in financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from (used in) financing activities which are activities that result in changes in the size and composition of the contributed equity and borrowings of the entity.

label: Net cash (used in) generated from investing activities
label_normalized: net cash (used in) generated from investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from (used in) investing activities which are the acquisition and disposal of long-term assets and other investments not included in cash equivalents.

label: Net cash generated from (used in) operating activities
label_normalized: net cash generated from (used in) operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from (used in) operating activities which are the principal revenue-producing activities of the entity and other activities that are not investing or financing activities.

label: Cash generated from (used in) operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash generated from/(used in) operations.

label: Operating surplus (deficit) before changes in working capital
label_normalized: operating surplus (deficit) before changes in working capital
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of operating profit or loss before changes in working capital.

label: Acquisition and subscription of shares in subsidiaries
label_normalized: acquisition and subscription of shares in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from obtaining or losing control of subsidiaries or other businesses which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Cash in hand
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of money and notes, kept to pay small amounts but not deposited in the bank.

label: Cash Receipts From Repayment Of Advances And Loans Made To Other Parties Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to other parties classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to other parties (other than advances and loans of a financial institution) which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Changes In Equity
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of increase (decrease) in equity.

label: (Increase) decrease in inventories of finished goods and work in progress
label_normalized: (increase) decrease in inventories of finished goods and work in progress
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the changes in inventories of finished goods and work in progress.Changes in inventories are measured by the value of the entries into inventories less the value of withdrawals and less the value of any recurrent losses of goods held in inventories during the accounting period. Some of these acquisitions and disposals are attributable to actual purchases or sales, but others reflect transactions that are internal to the enterprise.Changes in inventories (including work-in- progress) consist of changes in: a. stocks of outputs that are still held by the units that produced them prior to their being further processed, sold, delivered to other units or used in other ways; and b. stocks of products acquired from other units that are intended to be used for intermediate consumption or for resale without further processing; they are measured by the value of the entries into inventories less the value of withdrawals and the value of any recurrent losses of goods held in inventories.

label: Classes Of Share Capital Member
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares.

label: Total comprehensive surplus (deficit)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total comprehensive income which refers to the change in equity during a period resulting from transactions and other events, other than those changes resulting from transactions with owners in their capacity as owners.Total comprehensive income comprises all component of "profit or loss" and of "other comprehensive income".

label: Comprehensive surplus (deficit), attributable to non-controlling interests
label_normalized: comprehensive surplus (deficit), attributable to non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of comprehensive income attributable to non-controlling interests.

label: Comprehensive surplus (deficit), attributable to owners
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of comprehensive income attributable to the parent entity.

label: Computer Software
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of programmes and other operating information used by a computer.

label: Construction in progress/Asset work-in progress
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of long-term asset account in which the costs of constructing long-term assets are recorded.

label: Contract Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of entity’s right to consideration in exchange for goods or services that the entity has transferred to a customer when that right is conditioned on something other than the passage of time (for example, the entity’s future performance).

label: Contract Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of an entity’s obligation to transfer goods or services to a customer for which the entity has received consideration (or the amount is due) from the customer.

label: Copyrights Patents And Other Industrial Property Rights Service And Operating Rights
label_normalized: copyrights patents and other industrial property rights service and operating rights
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the exclusive and assignable legal right, given to the originator for a fixed number of years, to print, publish, perform, film, or record literary, artistic, or musical material and rights or titles for a set period, especially the sole right to exclude others from making, using, or selling an invention.

label: Total cost of sales
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cost of sales which are the amount of inventories recognized as expenses during the period, consisting of those costs previously included in the measurement of inventory that has now been sold and unallocated production overheads and abnormal amounts of production costs of inventories.

label: Current Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realize the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading;c. it expects to realize the asset within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in MFRS 107) unless the asset is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period.

label: Total current assets other than assets held for sale
label_normalized: total current assets other than assets held for sale
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current assets other than assets held for sale held by the reporting entity.

label: Contract assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of the reporting entity’s right to consideration in exchange for goods or services that the entity has transferred to a customer when that right is conditioned on something other than the passage of time (for example, the entity’s future performance).

label: Contract liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of the reporting entity’s obligation to transfer goods or services to a customer for which the entity has received consideration (or the amount is due) from the customer.

label: Derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Derivative financial liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Other investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Current Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:   a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. it does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not affect its classification.An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

label: Total current liabilities other than liabilities held for sale
label_normalized: total current liabilities other than liabilities held for sale
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current liabilities other than liabilities held for sale held by the reporting entity.

label: Borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay within a period of 12 months.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of liabilities with uncertain timing or amount.

label: Employee benefit liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

label: Refunds provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of refund provision. Refund is a pay back (money), typically to a customer who is not satisfied with goods or services bought.

label: Total current secured bank loans received and current portion of non-current secured bank loans received
label_normalized: total current secured bank loans received and current portion of non-current secured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current secured bank loans received and current portion of non-current secured bank loans received.

label: Tax assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate excess amount already paid in respect of current tax for current and prior periods over the amount due for those periods.

label: Current tax assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate excess amount already paid in respect of current tax for current and prior periods over the amount due for those periods.

label: Tax liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current tax for current and prior periods shall, to the extent unpaid, be recognized as a liability.

label: Current tax liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current tax for current and prior periods shall, to the extent unpaid, be recognized as a liability.

label: Total current trade receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current trade receivables.

label: Total current unsecured bank loans received and current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received
label_normalized: total current unsecured bank loans received and current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current unsecured bank loans received and current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received.

label: Customer acquisition costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of commission payments made to a dealer intermediary as consideration for signing up a new customer and the expenditures incurred in providing the customer a free or subsidised device, provided the customer signs a non-cancellable contract for a predetermined contractual period.

label: Deferred Tax Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income taxes recoverable in future periods in respect of:a. deductible temporary differences;b. the carryforward of unused tax losses; andc. the carryforward of unused tax credits.

label: Deferred Tax Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the amount of income taxes payable in future periods in respect of taxable temporary differences.

label: Depreciation, impairment and amortisation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amount of depreciation and amortisation expense. Depreciation and amortisation are the systematic allocations of depreciable amounts of assets over their useful lives.Report the value, for the reporting period, of impairment loss, which is the amount by which the carrying amount of an asset or a cash-generating unit exceeds its recoverable amount.

label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: depreciation of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of depreciation expenses. Depreciation is the systematic allocation of depreciable amounts of tangible assets over their useful lives.

label: Total derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics: a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’). b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net  investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Total derivative financial liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics: a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’). b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Earnings Per Share Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for earnings per share explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to earnings per share.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Emission Rights Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for emission rights explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to emission rights.

label: Description of accounting policy for short term employee benefits [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for short term employee benefits
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to employee benefits, which includes short-term employee benefits, state plans, post-employment benefits, termination benefits and other long-term employment benefits.

label: Description of accounting policy for exploration and development expenditures [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for exploration and development expenditures

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Fair Value Measurement Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for fair value measurement explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to fair value measurement.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Finance Income And Costs Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for finance income and costs explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to finance income and costs.

label: Description of accounting policy for financial instruments
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for financial instruments
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to financial instruments.

label: Description of accounting policy for foreign currencies [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for foreign currencies
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to foreign currencies including presentation and functional currencies, transactions and balances, translation of foreign currency financial statements etc.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Goodwill Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for goodwill explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to goodwill.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Government Grants
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for government grants
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to government grants.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Impairment Of Financial Assets Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for impairment of financial assets explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to impairment of financial assets.

label: Description of accounting policy for impairment of other assets [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for impairment of other assets
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to impairment of other assets.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Income Tax Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for income tax explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to income tax.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Intangible Assets Other Than Goodwill Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for intangible assets other than goodwill explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to intangible assets other than goodwill.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Interest Income And Expense Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for interest income and expense explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to interest income and expense.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Investment In Associates
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for investment in associates
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to investment in associates.

label: Description of accounting policy for investments properties [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for investments properties
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to investment property including its depreciation, impairment, transfer etc.

label: Description of accounting policy for investments in joint arrangements [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for investments in joint arrangements
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to investments in joint ventures and joint operations.

label: Description of accounting policy for share capital [text block]
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for share capital
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to research and development expense.

label: Description Of Accounting Policy For Leases Explanatory
label_normalized: description of accounting policy for leases explanatory
definition: Represents information pertaining to the measurement basis used with respect to leases.

label: Dividend paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend paid which refers to the distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

label: Dividends Paid Classified As Financing Activities
label_normalized: dividends paid classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments (i.e. owners of the company and/or non-controlling interest) in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Dividends Paid Classified As Operating Activities
label_normalized: dividends paid classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Dividends Received Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: dividends received classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Dividends Received Classified As Operating Activities
label_normalized: dividends received classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Effect Of Exchange Rate Changes On Cash And Cash Equivalents
label_normalized: effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents. Unrealised gains and losses arising from changes in foreign currency exchange rates are not cash flows. However, the effect of exchange rate changes on cash and cash equivalents held or due in a foreign currency is reported in the statement of cash flows in order to reconcile cash and cash equivalents at the beginning and the end of the period. This amount is presented separately from cash flows from operating, investing and financing activities and includes the differences, if any, had those cash flows been reported at end of period exchange rates.

label: Employee Benefits Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of employee benefits expenses.

label: Energy costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of costs of power derived from the utilization of physical or chemical resources, especially to provide light and heat or to work machines.

label: Entitys Total For Related Parties Member
label_normalized: entitys total for related parties member
definition: This member stands for the sum of components of related parties.

label: Equity
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity.Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

label: Equity And Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity and liabilities held by the reporting entity.Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

label: Equity attributable to owners
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of equity attributable to owners.

label: Equity attributable to owners
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sum of equity attributable to owners.

label: Equity Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the sum of equity.

label: Share-based compensation expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share-based compensation expense. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity  instruments (including shares or share options), orb. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Total other fee and commission income
label_normalized: total other fee and commission income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of other fee and commission income received.

label: Finance Costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance cost which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

label: Total finance income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance income which is income that were derived from the entity's financial assets.

label: Finished goods
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of materials or products which have received the final increments of value through manufacturing or processing operations, and which are being held in inventory for delivery, sale, or use.

label: Gains Losses On Cash Flow Hedges Before Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on cash flow hedges before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on cash flow hedges, before tax. Cash flow hedge is a hedge of the exposure to variability in cash flows that. i. is attributable to a particular risk associated with a recognized asset or liability (such as all or some future interest payments on variable rate debt) or a highly probable forecast transaction and ii. could affect profit or loss.

label: Gains Losses On Cash Flow Hedges Net Of Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on cash flow hedges net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on exchange differences on translation, net of tax. An entity shall disclose net exchange differences recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in a separate component of equity, and a reconciliation of the amount of such exchange differences at the beginning and end of the period.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of investment properties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or loss on disposal of investment properties to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Total gain (loss) on disposal of non-current assets
label_normalized: total gain (loss) on disposal of non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of gains or loss on disposal of non-current assets.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or loss on disposal of property, plant and equipment to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Gains (losses) on exchange differences on translation, before tax
label_normalized: gains (losses) on exchange differences on translation, before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on exchange differences on translation, before tax. An entity shall disclose net exchange differences recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in a separate component of equity, and a reconciliation of the amount of such exchange differences at the beginning and end of the period.

label: Gains (losses) on exchange differences on translation, net of tax
label_normalized: gains (losses) on exchange differences on translation, net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the gains or losses on hedges of net investments in foreign operations, net of tax. Net investment in a foreign operation is the amount of the reporting entity’s interest in the net assets of that operation.

label: Gains Losses On Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, before tax. A financial asset shall be measured at fair value through other comprehensive income if both of the following conditions are met:(a) the financial asset is held within a business model whose objective is achieved by both collecting contractual cash flows and selling financial assets and (b) the contractual terms of the financial asset give rise on specified dates to cash flows that are solely payments of principal and interest on the principal amount outstanding.

label: Gains Losses On Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, before tax. A financial asset shall be measured at fair value through other comprehensive income if both of the following conditions are met:(a) the financial asset is held within a business model whose objective is achieved by both collecting contractual cash flows and selling financial assets and(b) the contractual terms of the financial asset give rise on specified dates to cash flows that are solely payments of principal and interest on the principal amount outstanding.

label: Gains Losses On Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations Before Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on hedges of net investments in foreign operations before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on hedges of net investments in foreign operations, before tax. Net investment in a foreign operation is the amount of the reporting entity’s interest in the net assets of that operation.

label: Gains Losses On Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations Net Of Tax
label_normalized: gains losses on hedges of net investments in foreign operations net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on cash flow hedges, net of tax. Cash flow hedge is a hedge of the exposure to variability in cash flows that i. is attributable to a particular risk associated with a recognized asset or liability (such as all or some future interest payments on variable rate debt) or a highly probable forecast transaction and ii. could affect profit or loss.

label: Net fair value gain on derivatives
label_normalized: net fair value gain on derivatives
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net fair value gain on derivatives which is a gain or loss on a financial liability that is designated as at fair value through profit or loss in the remaining amount of change in the fair value of the liability which shall be presented in profit or loss.

label: Gains on disposals of other non-current assets
label_normalized: gains on disposals of other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains on disposal of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Gains On Disposals Of Property Plant And Equipment
label_normalized: gains on disposals of property plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain or loss arising from the derecognition of an item of property, plant and equipment which shall be determined as the difference between the net disposal proceeds, if any, and the carrying amount of the item.

label: Goodwill
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of assets representing the future economic benefits arising from other assets acquired in a business combination that are not individually identified and separately recognized.

label: Gross Profit
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gross profit which is revenue earned by an entity less the cost of achieving the sales during the reporting period. These costs are essentially direct costs such as wages and raw materials.

label: Total adjustment for impairment (reversal of impairment)
label_normalized: total adjustment for impairment (reversal of impairment)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of impairment or reversal of impairment.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of intangible assets
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of intangible assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on intangible assets recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment properties
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment properties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment properties recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on property, plant and equipment recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Income From Reimbursements Under Insurance Policies
label_normalized: income from reimbursements under insurance policies
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of expense reimbursement claimed from insurance company.

label: Tax expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate amount included in the determination of profit or loss for the period in respect of current tax and deferred tax.

label: Income Tax Relating To Components Of Other Comprehensive Income That Will Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss
label_normalized: income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss.

label: Income Tax Relating To Components Of Other Comprehensive Income That Will Not Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss
label_normalized: income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of aggregated income tax relating to components of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss.

label: Income tax relating to remeasurements of defined benefit plans of other comprehensive income
label_normalized: income tax relating to remeasurements of defined benefit plans of other comprehensive income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of income tax relating to remeasurement of defined benefit plans of other comprehensive income.

label: Income Taxes Paid Refund Classified As Operating Activities
label_normalized: income taxes paid refund classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash flows from income taxes. Cash flows arising from taxes on income shall be separately disclosed and shall be classified as cash flows from operating activities unless they can be specifically identified with financing and investing activities.

label: Increase Decrease In Cash And Cash Equivalents
label_normalized: increase decrease in cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net increase or decrease in cash and cash equivalents after the effect of exchange rate changes. Cash comprises cash on hand and demand deposits.Cash equivalents are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents after effect of exchange rate changes
label_normalized: net increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents after effect of exchange rate changes
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net increase or decrease in cash and cash equivalents before the effect of exchange rate changes.Cash comprises cash on hand and demand deposits.Cash equivalents are short-term, highly liquid investments that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Total changes in working capital
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of changes in working capital.

label: Acquisition (dilution) of equity interest in subsidiaries
label_normalized: acquisition (dilution) of equity interest in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of acquisition or dilution of equity interest in subsidiaries. A parent shall present non-controlling interests in the consolidated statement of financial position within equity, separately from the equity of the ownersof the parent.

label: Arising from conversion of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stock (ICULS)
label_normalized: arising from conversion of irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stock (iculs)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of conversion of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stock (ICULS). ICULS is a type of security that can be used to purchase underlying common shares.

label: Increase Decrease Through Sharebased Payment Transactions
label_normalized: increase decrease through sharebased payment transactions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from share-based payment transactions. A share-based payment transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services as consideration for its own      equity instruments (including shares or share options), orb. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle      the transaction with the supplier.

label: Other transactions with owners
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other transactions with owners not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Increase Decrease Through Transfers And Other Changes Equity
label_normalized: increase decrease through transfers and other changes equity
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of changes in equity resulting from other changes not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Treasury shares transactions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of treasury shares transactions. If an entity reacquires its own equity instruments, those instruments (‘treasury shares’) shall be deducted from equity. No gain or loss shall be recognised in profit or loss on the purchase, sale, issue or cancellation of an entity’s own equity instruments. Such treasury shares may be acquired and held by the entity or by other members of the consolidated group. Consideration paid or received shall be recognised directly in equity.

label: Intangible assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.

label: Intangible Assets Other Than Goodwill
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of intangible assets other than goodwill.

label: Intangible Assets Under Development
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of intangible assets arising from development (or from the development phase of an internal project). It shall be recognized if, and only if, an entity can demonstrate all of the following:a. the technical feasibility of completing the intangible asset so that it will be available for use or sale.b. its intention to complete the intangible asset and use or sell it.c. its ability to use or sell the intangible asset.d. how the intangible asset will generate probable future economic benefits. Among other things, the entity can demonstrate the existence of a market for the output of the intangible asset or the intangible asset itself or, if it is to be used internally, the usefulness of the intangible asset.e. the availability of adequate technical, financial and other resources to complete the development and to use or sell the intangible asset.f. its ability to measure reliably the expenditure attributable to the intangible asset during its development.

label: Intangible Exploration And Evaluation Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of some exploration and evaluation assets which are treated as intangible (e.g. drilling rights), whereas others are tangible (e.g. vehicles and drilling rigs). To the extent that a tangible asset is consumed in developing an intangible asset, the amount reflecting that consumption is part of the cost of the intangible asset. However, using a tangible asset to develop an intangible asset does not change a tangible asset into an intangible asset.

label: Interest income on loans, advances and financing
label_normalized: interest income on loans, advances and financing
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income on loans and receivables which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

label: Interest Income On Other Financial Assets
label_normalized: interest income on other financial assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from interest income on other financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Interest Paid Classified As Financing Activities
label_normalized: interest paid classified as financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Interest Paid Classified As Operating Activities
label_normalized: interest paid classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts paid by the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Interest Received Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: interest received classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Interest Received Classified As Operating Activities
label_normalized: interest received classified as operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Total inventories
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount of inventories which are: a. held for sale in the ordinary course of business; b. in the process of production for such sale; or c. in the form of materials or supplies to be consumed in the production process or in the rendering of services. Inventories encompass goods purchased and held for resale including, for example, merchandise purchased by a retailer and held for resale, or land and other property held for resale. Inventories also encompass finished goods produced, or work in progress being produced, by the entity and include materials and supplies awaiting use in the production process. In the case of a service provider, inventories include the costs of the service, for which the entity has not yet recognized the related revenue.

label: Investment properties
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of properties (land or a building—or part of a building—or both) held (by the owner or by the lessee under a finance lease) to earn rentals or for capital appreciation or both, rather than for:a.  use in the production or supply of goods or services or for administrative purposes; orb.  sale in the ordinary course of business.

label: Total investment properties completed, at carrying value
label_normalized: total investment properties completed, at carrying value
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of investment properties completed, at carrying value.

label: Total investment properties under construction or development, at cost
label_normalized: total investment properties under construction or development, at cost
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of investment properties under construction or development, at cost.

label: Investments in associates
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities, over which the investor has significant influence.

label: Investments in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of joint arrangements whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

label: Investment in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investment in entities controlled by another entity.

label: Other investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Issue of convertible notes, net of tax
label_normalized: issue of convertible notes, net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of convertible notes (or bonds or debts) which is a type of debt security that can be converted into a predetermined amount of the underlying company's equity at certain times during the bond's life, usually at the discretion of the bondholder.

label: Issuance of shares
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of issuance of shares which refers to the new allotment of shares during the reporting period.

label: Total issued capital
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Issued Capital Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of issued capital. Issued capital include ordinary shares, redeemable preference shares and non-redeemable preference shares.

label: Joint Control Or Significant Influence Member
label_normalized: joint control or significant influence member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the entities with joint control or significant influence. Joint control is the contractually agreed sharing of control of an arrangement, which exists only when decisions about the relevant activities require the unanimous consent of the parties sharing control.

label: Joint Ventures Where Entity Is Venturer Member
label_normalized: joint ventures where entity is venturer member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of joint ventures where entity is venturer. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that havejoint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement and a joint venturer is a party to a joint venture that has joint control of that joint venture.

label: Key management personnel
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of key management personnel compensation. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

label: Share option expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share option expenses. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entity: a. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity instruments (including shares or share options), or b. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Key Management Personnel Of Entity Or Parent Member
label_normalized: key management personnel of entity or parent member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of key management personnel. Key management personnel are those persons having authority and responsibility for planning, directing and controlling the activities of the entity, directly or indirectly, including any director (whether executive or otherwise) of that entity.

label: Total land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land.

label: Land And Buildings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of land and buildings.

label: Lease Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of present value of the lease payments that are not paid at that date.

label: Legal Proceedings Provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of liabilities held by the reporting entity.Liabilities are present obligations of the entity arising from past events, the settlement of which is expected to result in an outflow from the entity of resources embodying economic benefits.

label: Liabilities Included In Disposal Groups Classified As Held For Sale
label_normalized: liabilities included in disposal groups classified as held for sale
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

label: Licences And Franchises
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a lawfully granted license in writing, permitting the doing of an act controlled by copyright and authorization granted by a government or an entity to the reporting entity enabling them to carry out specified commercial activities.

label: Borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of outstanding funds held that the reporting entity is obligated to repay after a period of 12 months or more.

label: Legal proceedings provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Onerous contracts provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of onerous contracts, the present obligation under the contracts shall be recognized and measured as a provision.

label: Provision for decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation costs
label_normalized: provision for decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of obligation to pay decommissioning costs as a liability.

label: Restructuring provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of the following are examples of events that may fall under the definition of restructuring:a. sale or termination of a line of business;b. the closure of business locations in a country or region or the      relocation of business activities from one country or region      to another;c. changes in management structure, for example, eliminating      a layer of management; andd. fundamental reorganizations that have a material effect on      the nature and focus of the entity’s operations.

label: Warranty provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

label: Loss on disposal from other investments
label_normalized: loss on disposal from other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the loss on disposal from other investments. An interest in another entity refers to contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Loss on disposal of other non-current assets
label_normalized: loss on disposal of other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the disposal of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Losses On Disposals Of Property Plant And Equipment
label_normalized: losses on disposals of property plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain or loss arising from the derecognition of an item of property, plant and equipment which shall be determined as the difference between the net disposal proceeds, if any, and the carrying amount of the item.

label: Machinery
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of machines collectively.

label: Mining Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of exploration and evaluation expenditures recognized as assets in accordance with the entity’s accounting policy.

label: Other miscellaneous income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of miscellaneous other operating income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Motor Vehicles
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of motor vehicles which refer vehicles of any description, propelled by means of mechanism contained within itself and constructed or adapted so as to be capable of being used on roads, and includes a trailer.

label: Noncontrolling Interests
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity in subsidiaries not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

label: Noncontrolling Interests Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing equity in subsidiaries not attributable, directly or indirectly, to a parent.

label: Noncurrent Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current assets held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify an asset as current when:a. it expects to realize the asset, or intends to sell or consume it, in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the asset primarily for the purpose of trading;c. it expects to realize the asset within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. the asset is cash or a cash equivalent (as defined in MFRS 107) unless the asset is restricted from being exchanged or used to settle a liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period.An entity shall classify all other assets as non-current.

label: Assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
label_normalized: assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise,together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

label: Contract assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of the reporting entity’s right to consideration in exchange for goods or services that the entity has transferred to a customer when that right is conditioned on something other than the passage of time (for example, the entity’s future performance).

label: Contract liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of the reporting entity’s obligation to transfer goods or services to a customer for which the entity has received consideration (or the amount is due) from the customer.

label: Derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’). b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Derivative financial liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics:a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors. c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Other investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Noncurrent Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current liabilities held by the reporting entity.An entity shall classify a liability as current when:   a. it expects to settle the liability in its normal operating cycle;b. it holds the liability primarily for the purpose of trading;c. the liability is due to be settled within twelve months after the reporting period; ord. it does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement of the liability for at least twelve months after the reporting period. Terms of a liability that could, at the option of the counterparty, result in its settlement by the issue of equity instruments do not affect its classification.An entity shall classify all other liabilities as non-current.

label: Noncurrent Payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

label: Total non-current trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current trade payables.

label: Total non-current portion of non-current secured bank loans received
label_normalized: total non-current portion of non-current secured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current portion of non-current secured bank loans.

label: Total non-current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received
label_normalized: total non-current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current portion of non-current unsecured bank loans received.

label: Other non-current borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current borrowings.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of liabilities with uncertain timing or amount.

label: Employee benefit liabilities
