definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

label: Noncurrent Receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of amount billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of nontrade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Refund provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of refund provision.Refund is a pay back (money), typically to a customer who is not satisfied with goods or services bought.

label: Total non-current trade receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current  trade receivables.

label: Number Of Shares Issued And Fully Paid
label_normalized: number of shares issued and fully paid
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued and fully paid.

label: Number Of Shares Issued But Not Fully Paid
label_normalized: number of shares issued but not fully paid
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the number of shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Number Of Shares Outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the Number of shares outstanding.

label: Oil And Gas Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of exploration and evaluation expenditures recognized as assets in accordance with the entity’s accounting policy.

label: Onerous Contracts Provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of onerous contracts, the present obligation under the contracts shall be recognized and measured as a provision.

label: Ordinary Shares Member
definition: An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Other Adjustments For Noncash Items
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other adjustments for non-cash items not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Other adjustments to reconcile surplus (deficit)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other adjustments to reconcile profit (loss) not reported elsewhere in the statement to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Total other assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other cash and cash equivalents
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other cash and cash equivalents not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities
label_normalized: other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash payments to acquire equity or debt instruments of other entities which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Acquisition and subscription of shares in joint ventures
label_normalized: acquisition and subscription of shares in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from acquisition and subscription of shares in joint ventures which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Other cash receipts from sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities
label_normalized: other cash receipts from sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash receipts from the sales of equity or debt instruments of other entities which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Proceeds from disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: proceeds from disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from disposal of joint ventures which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Total other comprehensive surplus (deficit)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total other comprehensive income which comprises items of income and expense (including reclassification adjustments) that are not recognized in profit or loss as required or permitted by other MFRSs.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total other comprehensive income before tax which comprises items of income and expense (including reclassification adjustments) that are not recognized in profit or loss as required or permitted by other MFRSs.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax Cash Flow Hedges
label_normalized: other comprehensive income before tax cash flow hedges
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on cash flow hedges, before tax.

label: Other comprehensive income, before tax, exchange differences on translation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, before tax, exchange differences on translation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on exchange differences on translation, before tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income
label_normalized: other comprehensive income before tax financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, before tax.

label: Remeasurement of defined benefit liability
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of remeasurement of defined benefit liability. Remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset) comprise:a. actuarial gains and losses;b. the return on plan assets, excluding amounts      included in net interest on the net defined      benefit liability (asset); andc. any change in the effect of the asset ceiling,     excluding amounts included in net interest on the     net defined benefit liability (asset).

label: Other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on revaluation of property, plant and equipment, right-of-use assets and intangible assets
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, before tax, gains (losses) on revaluation of property, plant and equipment, right-of-use assets and intangible assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on revaluation of property, plant and equipment, right-of-use assets and intangible assets, before tax.If an asset’s carrying amount is increased as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus. However, the increase shall be recognized in profit or loss to the extent that it reverses a revaluation decrease of the same asset previously recognized in profit or loss.If an asset’s carrying amount is decreased as a result of a revaluation, the decrease shall be recognized in profit or loss. However, the decrease shall be recognized in other comprehensive income to the extent of any credit balance existing in the revaluation surplus in respect of that asset. The decrease recognized in other comprehensive income reduces the amount accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations
label_normalized: other comprehensive income before tax hedges of net investments in foreign operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on hedges of net investments in foreign operations, before tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax Cash Flow Hedges
label_normalized: other comprehensive income net of tax cash flow hedges
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on exchange differences on translation, net of tax.

label: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, exchange differences on translation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, net of tax, exchange differences on translation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the net of other comprehensive income on hedges of net investments in foreign operations, net of tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income
label_normalized: other comprehensive income net of tax financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, net of tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax Gains Losses From Investments In Equity Instruments
label_normalized: other comprehensive income net of tax gains losses from investments in equity instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period,  of other comprehensive income, net of tax, related to gains (losses) from changes inthe fair value of investments in equity instruments.

label: Remeasurement of defined benefit liability
definition: Report the value, for the reporting  period, of remeasurement of defined benefit liability. Remeasurements of the net defined benefit liability (asset) comprise:a. actuarial gains and losses;b. the return on plan assets, excluding amounts      included in net interest on the net defined benefit      liability (asset); andc. any change in the effect of the asset ceiling, excluding       amounts included in net interest on the net defined       benefit liability (asset).

label: Other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
label_normalized: other comprehensive income, net of tax, gains (losses) on revaluation
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of gains or losses on revaluation of property, plant and equipment, right-of-use assets and intangible assets, net of tax.If an asset’s carrying amount is increased as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus. However, the increase shall be recognized in profit or loss to the extent that it reverses a revaluation decrease of the same asset previously recognized in profit or loss.If an asset’s carrying amount is decreased as a result of a revaluation, the decrease shall be recognized in profit or loss. However, the decrease shall be recognized in other comprehensive income to the extent of any credit balance existing in the revaluation surplus in respect of that asset. The decrease recognized in other comprehensive income reduces the amount accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations
label_normalized: other comprehensive income net of tax hedges of net investments in foreign operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net other comprehensive income on cash flow hedges, net of tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income That Will Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Before Tax
label_normalized: other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss, before tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income That Will Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Net Of Tax
label_normalized: other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of other comprehensive income that will be reclassified to profit or loss, net of tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income That Will Not Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Before Tax
label_normalized: other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss, before tax.

label: Other Comprehensive Income That Will Not Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Net Of Tax
label_normalized: other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of other comprehensive income that will not be reclassified to profit or loss, net of tax.

label: Other Current Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other current borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other current borrowings.

label: Other Current Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Total other current payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other current trade payables.

label: Total other current receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other current receivables.

label: Other employee benefit expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other employee expenses not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other expenses which refer to expenses not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other expenses which refer to expenses not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other Fee And Commission Income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, other fee and commission income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other Finance Income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other finance income not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Total other income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of income for the reporting entity that comes from anything other than its ordinary operations. Other income includes items such as interest from the reporting entity's bank accounts, profit from the sale of a fixed asset, and so forth. Other income is not recurring and, as a result, is not included in some calculations of profit or loss.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from financing activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from financing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from investing activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Other cash inflows (outflows) from operating activities
label_normalized: other cash inflows (outflows) from operating activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other cash inflows or outflows not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as operating activities.

label: Other Intangible Assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other intangible assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other inventories
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other inventories not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other Longterm Benefits
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other long-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Other long-term employee benefits are all employee benefits other than short-term employee benefits, post-employment benefits and termination benefits.

label: Other Longterm Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Total other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Other Noncurrent Liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current liabilities not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Total other non-current payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current payables.

label: Total other non-current receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other non-current receivables.

label: Total other payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other trade payables.

label: Other Property Plant And Equipment
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other property, plant and equipment not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Total other receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of other receivables.

label: Other Related Parties Member
definition: This member stands for a component inf the form of other related parties not reported elsewhere in other categories.

label: Reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

label: Reserves [Member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the total amount of distributable and non-distributable reserves.

label: Other Revenue
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other revenue not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other Shortterm Employee Benefits
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other short-term employee benefits expenses during the reporting period. Short-term employee benefits are employee benefits (other than termination benefits) that are expected to be settled wholly before twelve months after the end of the annual reporting period in which the employees render the related service.

label: Other Shortterm Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current provisions not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other work performed by company and capitalised
label_normalized: other work performed by company and capitalised
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of other work performed by the reporting entity and capitalized not reported elsewhere in the statement.

label: Parent Member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the parent entity.

label: Development expenditure incurred
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments from purchase of land held for development, which consists of land where no development activities have been carried out or where development activities are not expected to be completed within the normal operating cycle. Such land is classified within non-current assets and is stated at cost less any accumulated impairment losses which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Payments Of Other Equity Instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments of other equity instrument.

label: Payments To Acquire Or Redeem Entitys Shares
label_normalized: payments to acquire or redeem entitys shares
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to repurchase and redemption of entity's shares which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Payments To And On Behalf Of Employees
label_normalized: payments to and on behalf of employees
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to and on behalf of employees which includes expenses paid by the employees on behalf of the entity and personal expenses paid by the entity for the employees.

label: Payments To Suppliers For Goods And Services
label_normalized: payments to suppliers for goods and services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for goods and services acquired by the entity from third parties (suppliers).

label: Underwriting commissions and fund management income
label_normalized: underwriting commissions and fund management income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from underwriting commissions and fund management. Underwriting commissions are the compensation that an entity (a broker) receives for placing a new issue with investors and fund management is the process of managing money.

label: Defined benefit plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined benefit plans. Defined benefit plans are post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

label: Defined contribution plans
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the post-employment benefit expense  during the reporting period in relation to defined contribution plans. Defined contribution plans are post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

label: Proceeds from share-based compensation transactions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from equity settled, share-based compensation plan or cash settled, performance-based option scheme which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds From Government Grants Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: proceeds from government grants classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from government grants which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Government grants are assistance by government in the form of transfers of resources to an entity in return for past or future compliance with certain conditions relating to the operating activities of the entity. They exclude those forms of government assistance which cannot reasonably have a value placed upon them and transactions with government which cannot be distinguished from the normal trading transactions of the entity.

label: Proceeds from issuing debentures, loans, notes, bonds, mortgages and other short-term and long-term borrowings
label_normalized: proceeds from issuing debentures, loans, notes, bonds, mortgages and other short-term and long-term borrowings
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing debentures, loans, notes, bonds, mortgages and other short-term and long-term borrowings which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds From Issuing Other Equity Instruments
label_normalized: proceeds from issuing other equity instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing other equity instruments which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds from issuing shares or other equity instruments
label_normalized: proceeds from issuing shares or other equity instruments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from issuing shares which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Proceeds from sales of other non-current assets
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the report, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Other non-current assets may include other long-term assets not included in investments, fixed or intangible assets categories.

label: Proceeds From Sales Of Intangible Assets Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of intangible assets classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of intangible assets which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Intangible assets are identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.

label: Proceeds from disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from disposal of associates which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Proceeds from sale of other investment
label_normalized: proceeds from sale of other investment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sale of other investment not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Proceeds from sales of property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: proceeds from sales of property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of property, plant and equipment which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.Property, plant and equipment are tangible items that: a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; and b. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Total surplus (deficit)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss which is the total of income less expenses, excluding the components of other comprehensive income.

label: Surplus (deficit), attributable to non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss allocated to non-controlling interests of the subsidiary during the reporting period.

label: Surplus (deficit), attributable to members of company
label_normalized: surplus (deficit), attributable to members of company
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss attributable to the parent entity, which refers to profit or loss of the consolidated entity after adjusting for non-controlling interests.

label: Profit (loss) before tax, from continuing operations
label_normalized: profit (loss) before tax, from continuing operations
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit before tax which is a profitability measure that looks at an entity's profits before the entity has to pay corporate income tax by deducting all expenses from revenue including interest expenses and operating expenses except for income tax.

label: Surplus (deficit) of income over expenditure
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss from continuing operations which are the after-tax earnings that are generated from operational activities.

label: Surplus (deficit) from discontinued operations, net of tax
label_normalized: surplus (deficit) from discontinued operations, net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of post-tax profit or loss from discontinued operations. Discontinued operation is a component of an entity that either has been disposed of or is classified as held for sale and:a. represents a separate major line of business or geographical area of operations,b. is part of a single coordinated plan to dispose of a separate major line of business or geographical area of operations orc. is a subsidiary acquired exclusively with a view to resale.

label: Profit Loss From Operating Activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of profit or loss from operating expenses which refers to gross profit minus the overheads associated with production.

label: Property development cost
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of property development costs which comprise all costs that are directly attributable to development activities or that can be allocated on a reasonable basis to such activities.

label: Property Plant And Equipment
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of property, plant and equipment which are tangible items that:a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; andb. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Provision For Decommissioning Restoration And Rehabilitation Costs
label_normalized: provision for decommissioning restoration and rehabilitation costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of obligation to pay decommissioning costs as a liability.

label: Provisions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of liabilities with uncertain timing or amount.

label: Employee benefit liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of employee benefits which are all forms of consideration given by the reporting entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

label: Purchase Of Intangible Assets Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: purchase of intangible assets classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire intangible assets which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Intangible assets are identifiable non-monetary assets without physical substance.

label: Acquisition and subscription of shares in associates
label_normalized: acquisition and subscription of shares in associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the aggregate cash flows arising from acquisition and subscription of shares in associates which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Purchase of other investment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments from purchase of other investment not reported elsewhere in the statement, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Purchase of other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the report, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Other non-current assets may include other long-term assets not included in investments, fixed or intangible assets categories.

label: Purchase Of Property Plant And Equipment Classified As Investing Activities
label_normalized: purchase of property plant and equipment classified as investing activities
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments to acquire property, plant and equipment which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities. Property, plant and equipment are tangible items that: a. are held for use in the production or supply of goods or services, for rental to others, or for administrative purposes; and b. are expected to be used during more than one period.

label: Purchases of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of goods from related parties.

label: Purchases of property and other assets
label_normalized: purchases of property and other assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for purchase of property and other assets from related parties.

label: Raw materials
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the basic materials from which a product is made.

label: Raw Materials And Consumables Used
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of raw materials and consumables used. Raw materials are the basic materials from which the products were made, and consumables are commodities that are intended  to be used up relatively quickly.

label: Receipts From Contracts Held For Dealing Or Trading Purpose
label_normalized: receipts from contracts held for dealing or trading purpose
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from contracts held for dealing and trading purposes.

label: Receipts From Royalties Fees Commissions And Other Revenue
label_normalized: receipts from royalties fees commissions and other revenue
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from royalties, fees, commissions and other revenue.The use by others of entity assets gives rise to revenue in the form of:a. interest—charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity;b. royalties—charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software; andc. dividends—distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

label: Receipts From Sales Of Goods And Rendering Of Services
label_normalized: receipts from sales of goods and rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from sales of goods and rendering of services. Goods includes goods produced by the entity for the purpose of sale and goods purchased for resale. The rendering of services typically involves the performance by the entity of a contractually agreed task over an agreed period of time.

label: Trade receivables due from contract customers
label_normalized: trade receivables due from contract customers
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of gross amount due from customers for contract work.

label: Recipes Formulae Models Designs And Prototypes
label_normalized: recipes formulae models designs and prototypes
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of a set of instructions for preparing a particular dish and a particular design or version of a product.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Cash Flow Hedges Before Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on cash flow hedges before tax
definition: Report the value, for the  reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on cash flow hedges, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Cash Flow Hedges Net Of Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on cash flow hedges net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translations, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translation, before tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translation, before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translations, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translation, net of tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on exchange differences on translation, net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on hedges of net investment in foreign operations, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Before Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Financial Assets Measured At Fair Value Through Other Comprehensive Income Net Of Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on financial assets measured at fair value through other comprehensive income, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations Before Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on hedges of net investments in foreign operations before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on hedges of net investment in foreign operations, before tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Reclassification Adjustments On Hedges Of Net Investments In Foreign Operations Net Of Tax
label_normalized: reclassification adjustments on hedges of net investments in foreign operations net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of reclassification adjustments on cash flow hedges, net of tax. Reclassification adjustments are amounts reclassified to profit or loss in the current period that were recognized in other comprehensive income in the current or previous periods.

label: Refunds Provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of refund provision.Refund is a pay back (money), typically to a customer who is not satisfied with goods or services bought.

label: Rental Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the rental expenses during the period. Rental expenses  include any sum paid for the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

label: Rental Income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from rental income. Rental income includes  any sum received from the use or occupation of any property or part thereof, including premiums and other payments in connection with the use or occupation of the property.

label: Repayments of amounts borrowed
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments for the repayments of amount borrowed which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Research And Development Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of all expenditure that is directly attributable to research or development activities.

label: Hedging reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of hedging reserves.Derivatives are financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics.a. its value changes in response to the change in a specified interest rate, financial instrument price, commodity price, foreign exchange rate, index of prices or rates, credit rating or credit index, or other variable, provided in the case of a non financial variable that the variable is not specific to a party to the contract (sometimes called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net investment or an initial net investment that is smaller than would be required for other types of contracts that would be expected to have a similar response to changes in market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Foreign currency translation reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of accumulated net exchange differences recognized in other comprehensive income. Foreign currency translation reserves comprise of all foreign currency differences arising from the translation of the financial statements of subsidiaries whose functional currencies are different from that of the reporting entity’s functional currency as well as foreign currency differences arising from the translation of monetary items that are considered to form part of a net investment in a foreign operation.

label: Hedging reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing hedging reserves.Derivatives are financial instruments or other contracts with all three of the following characteristics.a. its value changes in      response to the change in      a specified interest rate,      financial instrument price,      commodity price, foreign      exchange rate, index of      prices or rates, credit      rating or credit index, or      other variable, provided in      the case of a non financial      variable that the variable      is not specific to a party to      the contract (sometimes      called the ‘underlying’).b. it requires no initial net      investment or an initial      net investment that is      smaller than would be      required for other types of      contracts that would be      expected to have a similar      response to changes in      market factors.c. it is settled at a future date.

label: Reserve Of Sharebased Payments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of corresponding equity for goods or services received in an equity settled share-based payment transaction.

label: Reserve Of Sharebased Payments Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the goods or services received in an equity settled share-based payment transaction.

label: Restructuring Provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of the following examples of events that may fall under the definition of restructuring: a. sale or termination of a line of business; b. the closure of business locations in a country or region or the relocation of business activities from one country or region to another; c. changes in management structure, for example, eliminating a layer of management; and d. fundamental reorganizations that have a material effect on the nature and focus of the entity’s operations.

label: Total retained earnings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the reporting entity's cumulative undistributed earnings or deficit.

label: Retained Earnings Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the net profit available for distibution, less any distribution made.

label: Revaluation reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of increase in carrying amount as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Revaluation Surplus Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the increase in carrying amount as a result of a revaluation, the increase shall be recognised in other comprehensive income and accumulated in equity under the heading of revaluation surplus.

label: Revenue
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue which is a gross inflow of economic benefits during the period arising in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity when those inflows result in increases in equity, other than increases relating to contributions from equity participants.

label: Net dividend
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend income which refers to distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

label: Total interest income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the sum of revenue from interest income received which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

label: Revenue from rendering of shipping and shipping related services
label_normalized: revenue from rendering of shipping and shipping related services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from the rendering of courier and related services which refers to the process of transporting an item.

label: Income from rendering of information technology services
label_normalized: income from rendering of information technology services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from the rendering of information technology and related services which refers to the application of business and technical expertise to enable organizations in the creation, management and optimization of or access to information and business processes.

label: Total revenue from rendering of services
label_normalized: total revenue from rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the sum of revenue from rendering of services.

label: Revenue from rendering of services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from sale of goods to related parties.

label: Income from rendering of telecommunication services
label_normalized: income from rendering of telecommunication services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from the rendering of telecommunication and related services which includes fixed-network services (data retail, Internet retail, voice retail and wholesale) and mobile services.

label: Revenue from rendering of transportation services
label_normalized: revenue from rendering of transportation services
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from the rendering of transportation and related services in relation to the public conveyance of passengers or goods.

label: Revenue From Royalties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from royalties which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of the entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

label: Revenue From Sale Of Agricultural Produce
label_normalized: revenue from sale of agricultural produce
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sales of harvested products from the entity’s biological assets.

label: Revenue From Sale Of Food And Beverage
label_normalized: revenue from sale of food and beverage
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from sales of food and beverage.

label: Total revenue from sale of goods
label_normalized: total revenue from sale of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of revenue from sale of goods.

label: Revenue from sale of goods
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for revenue from rendering of services to related parties.

label: Revenue From Sale Of Oil And Gas Products
label_normalized: revenue from sale of oil and gas products
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from sale of fuel oil that is recognized when the risks and rewards of ownership of the oil have been passed to the customers which occur when the oil has been delivered and the collectability of the related receivable is reasonably assured.

label: Revenue from sale of broadband and telecommunication
label_normalized: revenue from sale of broadband and telecommunication
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of revenue from the sales of broadband and telecommunications.

label: Total reversal of impairment loss recognised in profit or loss
label_normalized: total reversal of impairment loss recognised in profit or loss
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of impairment loss reversed recognized in profit or loss.

label: Reversal of impairment in development expenditure
label_normalized: reversal of impairment in development expenditure
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss in development properties. If, in a subsequent period, the amount of impairment loss decreases and the decrease can be related objectively to an event occurring after the impairment was recognized (such as an improvement in the debtor’s credit rating), the previously recognized impairment loss shall be reversed either directly or by adjusting an allowance account. The reversal shall not result in a carrying amount of the financial asset that exceeds what the amortized cost would have been had the impairment not been recognized at the date the impairment is reversed. The amount of the loss shall be recognized in profit or loss.

label: Reversal of impairment loss on receivables
label_normalized: reversal of impairment loss on receivables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss on receivables. If, in a subsequent period, the amount of impairment loss decreases and the decrease can be related objectively to an event occurring after the impairment was recognized (such as an improvement in the debtor’s credit rating), the previously recognized impairment loss shall be reversed either directly or by adjusting an allowance account. The reversal shall not result in a carrying amount of the financial asset that exceeds what the amortized cost would have been had the impairment not been recognized at the date the impairment is reversed. The amount of the loss shall be recognized in profit or loss.

label: Reversal of impairment in property, plant and equipment
label_normalized: reversal of impairment in property, plant and equipment
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of impairment loss in property, plant and equipment. If, in a subsequent period, the amount of impairment loss decreases and the decrease can be related objectively to an event occurring after the impairment was recognized (such as an improvement in the debtor’s credit rating), the previously recognized impairment loss shall be reversed either directly or by adjusting an allowance account. The reversal shall not result in a carrying amount of the financial asset that exceeds what the amortized cost would have been had the impairment not been recognized at the date the impairment is reversed. The amount of the loss shall be recognized in profit or loss.

label: Reversal of inventories written down to net realisable value
label_normalized: reversal of inventories written down to net realisable value
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the reversal of inventories written down to net realizable value. When the circumstances that previously caused inventories to be written down below cost no longer exist or when there is clear evidence of an increase in net realizable value because of changed economic circumstances, the amount of the write-down is reversed (i.e. the reversal is limited to the amount of the original write-down) so that the new carrying amount is the lower of the cost and the revised net realizable value.

label: Right-of-use assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contracts which is, or contains, a lease if the contract conveys the right to control the use of an identified asset for a period of time in exchange for consideration.

label: Royalty Expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of expenses on royalty which refers to charges for the use of long-term assets of another entity, for example, patents, trademarks, copyrights and computer software.

label: Sales of property and other assets
label_normalized: sales of property and other assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for sale of property and other assets to related parties.

label: Total secured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of secured bank loans.

label: Services received
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, for service received from related parties.

label: Share Of Other Comprehensive Income Of Associates And Joint Ventures Accounted For Using Equity Method That Will Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Before Tax
label_normalized: share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method that will be reclassified to profit or loss before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted using equity method, which refers to investor's share in its associates' and joint ventures' other comprehensive income. Equity method is a method of accounting whereby the investment is initially recognized at cost and adjusted thereafter for the post acquisition change in the investor’s share of the investee’s net assets.

label: Share Of Other Comprehensive Income Of Associates And Joint Ventures Accounted For Using Equity Method That Will Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Net Of Tax
label_normalized: share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method that will be reclassified to profit or loss net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted using equity method, which refers to investor's share in its associates' and joint ventures' other comprehensive income. Equity method is a method of accounting whereby the investment is initially recognized at cost and adjusted thereafter for the post acquisition change in the investor’s share of the investee’s net assets.

label: Share Of Other Comprehensive Income Of Associates And Joint Ventures Accounted For Using Equity Method That Will Not Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Before Tax
label_normalized: share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method that will not be reclassified to profit or loss before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted using equity method, which refers to investor's share in its associates' and joint ventures' other comprehensive income. Equity method is a method of accounting whereby the investment is initially recognized at cost and adjusted thereafter for the post acquisition change in the investor’s share of the investee’s net assets.

label: Share Of Other Comprehensive Income Of Associates And Joint Ventures Accounted For Using Equity Method That Will Not Be Reclassified To Profit Or Loss Net Of Tax
label_normalized: share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method that will not be reclassified to profit or loss net of tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the share of other comprehensive income of associates and joint ventures accounted using equity method, which refers to investor's share in its associates' and joint ventures' other comprehensive income. Equity method is a method of accounting whereby the investment is initially recognized at cost and adjusted thereafter for the post acquisition change in the investor’s share of the investee’s net assets.

label: Share of results of associates and joint venture separately
label_normalized: share of results of associates and joint venture separately
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share of profit or loss of associates and joint ventures in accordance to the proportion of shares owned by the reporting entity.

label: Total current borrowings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current borrowings.

label: Short-term deposits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of short term deposits.Deposit is the sum of money paid into a bank or building society account.

label: Short-term investments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Legal proceedings provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of present obligation as a result of a past obligating event - on the basis of the evidence available and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable.

label: Onerous contracts provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of onerous contracts, the present obligation under the contracts shall be recognized and measured as a provision.

label: Provision for decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation costs
label_normalized: provision for decommissioning, restoration and rehabilitation costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of obligation to pay decommissioning costs as a liability.

label: Restructuring provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of the following are examples of events that may fall under the definition of restructuring:a. sale or termination of a line of business;b. the closure of business locations in a country or region or     the relocation of business activities from one country or      region to another;c. changes in management structure, for example,     eliminating a layer of management; andd. fundamental reorganisations that have a material effect     on the nature and focus of the entity’s operations.

label: Warranty provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

label: Social Security Contributions
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of social security contributions which are recognized as an expense in the year which the service are rendered by employees and the entity.

label: Spare parts
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of duplicate parts to replace a lost or damaged parts of a machine.

label: Statutory Reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of statutory reserves.Statutory reserves is a requirement of which banking institutions must maintain in their Statutory Reserves Accounts at the Bank Negara Malaysia, balances that are at least equal to the prescribed ratio of the eligible liabilities.

label: Statutory Reserve Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount of liquid assets that entity must hold in order to remain solvent and attain partial protection against a substantial investment loss, and holding reserves reduces the risk of insurance.Statutory reserves is a requirement of which banking institutions must maintain in their Statutory Reserves Accounts at the Bank Negara Malaysia, balances that are at least equal to the prescribed ratio of eligible liabilities.

label: Subsidiaries Member
definition: This member stands for a component in the form of entity representing the subsidiaries. An entity that is controlled by another entity.

label: Trade And Other Current Payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed to the reporting entity by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

label: Total current trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current trade payables.

label: Trade And Other Current Receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of amount billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of non-trade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Trade And Other Payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount billed to the reporting entity by its suppliers for goods delivered to or services consumed by the reporting entity in the ordinary course of business and other types of payables, such as accrued expenses, dividends payable, or payroll expenses.

label: Total trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of trade payables.

label: Trade And Other Receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of amount billed by the reporting entity to its customers when it delivers goods or services to them in the ordinary course of business and  various forms of nontrade receivables which do not generally result from the operations of the business.

label: Total trade receivables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of trade receivables.

label: Treasury Shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity instruments of the reporting entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.

label: Treasury Shares Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing equity instruments of the reporting entity that have been issued and subsequently reacquired by the entity.If an entity reacquires its own equity instruments, those instruments (‘treasury shares’) shall be deducted from equity. No gain or loss shall be recognised in profit or loss on the purchase, sale, issue or cancellation of an entity’s own equity instruments. Such treasury shares may be acquired and held by the entity or by other members of the consolidated group. Consideration paid or received shall be recognised directly in equity.

label: Total unsecured bank loans received
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of unsecured bank loans received.

label: Vehicles
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of vehicles.

label: Wages, salaries and others
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of wages, salaries, paid annual leave and sick leave, bonuses and non-monetary benefits which are accrued in the period in which the services are rendered by employees.

label: Warrant Reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of component of equity representing from issuing share purchase  warrants, other than those resulting from share-based payment arrangements.

label: Warrant Reserve Member
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing from issuing share purchase  warrants, other than those resulting from share-based payment arrangements.

label: Warranty Provision
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of legal obligation as a result of the sale of the product with a warranty and an outflow of resources embodying economic benefits in settlement is probable for the warranties as a whole.

label: Work in progress
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the total value of the materials and labor for unfinished projects.

label: Write offs of inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of  inventories written off to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Property, plant and equipment written off
label_normalized: property, plant and equipment written off
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of write-offs of property, plant and equipment to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Nature of financial statements
definition: Represents information pertaining to nature of financial statements.

label: Application of submission
definition: Represents information pertaining to the application of submission on the filing.

label: Audit exemption category
definition: Represents information pertaining to the type of private company covered under audit exemption.

label: Basis of accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements
label_normalized: basis of accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements
definition: Represents information pertaining to basis of accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements.

label: Company's current financial year end date
label_normalized: company's current financial year end date
definition: Represents information pertaining to company's current financial year end date.

label: Company's current financial year start date
label_normalized: company's current financial year start date
definition: Represents information pertaining to company's current financial year start date.

label: Company's previous financial year end date
label_normalized: company's previous financial year end date
definition: Represents information pertaining to company's previous financial year end date.

label: Company's previous financial year start date
label_normalized: company's previous financial year start date
definition: Represents information pertaining to company's previous financial year start date.

label: Company registration number
definition: Represents information pertaining to company registered number. Company registration number pattern should be maximum 7 digits plus 1 alphabet{[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[0-9],[A-Z]} example : [5050505X]

label: Court Order reference number
definition: Represents information pertaining to court order reference number

label: Description of functional currency
definition: Represents information pertaining to description of functional currency  which is used for statistical purposes as to identify the company's functional currency used in it's  major business transactions.

label: Description of presentation currency
definition: Represents information pertaining to description of presentation currency. Financial statements will have MYR as mandatory presentation of currency in Malaysia.

label: Disclosure of financial statements audit status
label_normalized: disclosure of financial statements audit status
definition: Represents information pertaining to the audit status of financial statements of the company.

label: Disclosure of financial statements preparation for current submission
label_normalized: disclosure of financial statements preparation for current submission
definition: Represents information pertaining to whether company is preparing financial statements for first time since incorporation or subsequent submission

label: Disclosure of other accounting standards applied
label_normalized: disclosure of other accounting standards applied
definition: Represents information pertaining to other accounting standards applied to prepare the financial statements.

label: Former name of the company
definition: Represents information pertaining to last former name of the company.

label: Level of rounding used in financial statements
label_normalized: level of rounding used in financial statements
definition: Represents information pertaining to level of rounding used in financial statements.

label: Name and version of software used to generate XBRL file
label_normalized: name and version of software used to generate xbrl file
definition: Represents information pertaining to the name and version of software used to generate XBRL file.

label: Name of company
definition: Represents information pertaining to current company's name.

label: New Company registration number
definition: Represents information pertaining to company registered number.  The new company registration number format consists of a 12 digit number, example : 201901000005

label: Origin of company
definition: Represents information pertaining origin of the company whether incorporated in Malaysia or incorporated outside Malaysia.

label: Status of carrying on business during the financial year
label_normalized: status of carrying on business during the financial year
definition: Represents information pertaining to status of carrying on business during the financial year.

label: Status of company
definition: Represents information pertaining to status of company as at the financial year end.

label: Statutory Declaration for rectification
definition: Represents information pertaining to the date of statutory declaration for rectification

label: Taxonomy version
definition: Represents information pertaining to the Taxonomy version

label: Types of company
definition: Represents information pertaining to the type of company as at the financial year end.

label: Type of submission
definition: Represents information pertaining to type of submission for preparing financial statements.

label: Adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs
label_normalized: adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for decrease (increase) in property development costs to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the statement to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses
label_normalized: adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for performance-based employee share scheme and other expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities. Share-based payment arrangement is an agreement between the entity (or another group entity or any shareholder of any group entity) and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receivea. cash or other assets of the entity for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, orb. equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, provided the specified vesting conditions, if any, are met.

label: Adjustments for share of profits of joint ventures (net of tax)
label_normalized: adjustments for share of profits of joint ventures (net of tax)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share of joint ventures post-tax profit to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.  A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

label: Adjustments for share option expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for share option expenses to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.  Share-based payment arrangement is an agreement between the entity (or another group entity or any shareholder of any group entity) and another party (including an employee) that entitles the other party to receivea. cash or other assets of the entity for amounts that are based on the price (or value) of equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, orb. equity instruments (including shares or share options) of the entity or another group entity, provided the specified vesting conditions, if any are met.

label: Adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
label_normalized: adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains)
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for unrealised foreign exchange losses (gains) to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Aggregate profit (loss) before tax
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of total profit or loss before tax. An entity shall report cash flows from operating activities using the indirect method, whereby profit or loss is adjusted for the effects of transactions of a non-cash nature, any deferrals or accruals of past or future operating cash receipts or payments, and items of income or expense associated with investing or financing cash flows.

label: Deferred income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of amortization of deferred income such as grants. Grants which are related to income, are presented as part of profit or loss, either separately or under a general heading such as ‘Other income’; alternatively, they are deducted in reporting the related expense.

label: Other changes in shares issued and fully paid
label_normalized: other changes in shares issued and fully paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued and fully paid which are not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other changes in shares issued but not fully paid
label_normalized: other changes in shares issued but not fully paid
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Amount of outstanding shares issued during financial year
label_normalized: amount of outstanding shares issued during financial year
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued during the financial year.

label: Arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion
label_normalized: arising from conversion of iculs by mandatory conversion
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by mandatory conversion.

label: Arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option
label_normalized: arising from conversion of iculs by surrender option
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares arising from conversion of ICULS by surrender option.

label: Shares issued during financial year
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued during financial year.

label: Amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding
label_normalized: amount of shares issued and fully paid, outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares issued and fully paid.

label: Shares issued during financial year
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, other changes in shares issued but not fully paid.

label: Amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding
label_normalized: amount of shares issued but not fully paid, outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding at the beginning of the period.

label: Issued for cash under ESOS
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under ESOS.

label: Issued for cash under private placement
label_normalized: issued for cash under private placement
definition: Report the value, for the reporting date, the shares issued for cash under private placement.

label: Amount of shares outstanding
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of shares outstanding.

label: Assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
label_normalized: assets or disposal group classified as held for sale or as held for distribution to owners
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of group of assets to be disposed of, by sale or otherwise, together as a group in a single transaction, and liabilities directly associated with those assets that will be transferred in the transaction. The group includes goodwill acquired in a business combination if the group is a cash-generating unit to which goodwill has been allocated or if it is an operation within such a cash-generating unit.

label: Assets other than assets held for sale
label_normalized: assets other than assets held for sale
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of assets other than assets held for sale held by the reporting entity.

label: Bad debts recovered
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bad debts recovered. A debt incurred from a loan, a credit line, or an accounts receivable that is recovered either in whole or in part after it had been written off or classified by the entity as a bad debt.

label: Bearer biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of bearer biological assets other than bearer plants.

label: Benefits-in-kind
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of benefits in kind which are allowances or additional compensation that are not included in the paycheck as wages, but carry financial value.

label: Bonus
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of wages, salaries, paid annual leave and sick leave, bonuses and non-monetary benefits which are accrued in the period in which the services are rendered by employees.

label: Bonus
