definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of bonus which are additional compensation given to directors above their normal salaries.

label: Building on freehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on permanent and absolute tenure of land with freedom to dispose of it at will.

label: Building on long term leasehold land
label_normalized: building on long term leasehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

label: Building on short term leasehold land
label_normalized: building on short term leasehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of buildings which include any house, hut, shed or roofed enclosure, whether used for the purpose of human habitation or otherwise, any wall, fence, platform, sewerage system, underground tank, hoarding, dock, jetty, landing-stage, swimming pool, bridge, railway line, and any other structure, support or foundation related to the building on land held on lease being a lease with an unexpired period of less than fifty years.

label: Capital distributions from associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of capital distributions from associates, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Capital from non-redeemable preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Capital from ordinary shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of ordinary share capital issued. An ordinary share is an equity instrument that is subordinate to all other classes of equity instruments.

label: Capital from redeemable preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of redeemable shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Cash equivalents with other financial institutions
label_normalized: cash equivalents with other financial institutions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of cash equivalents which are short-term, highly liquid investments with other financial institutions that are readily convertible to known amounts of cash and which are subject to an insignificant risk of changes in value.

label: Perpetual sukuk issuance expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash payments in relation to expense incurred from the issuance of perpetual sukuk.

label: Cash-settled share-based payment liability
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of goods or services acquired and the liability incurred at the fair value of the liability. Until the liability is settled, the entity shall remeasure the fair value of the liability at the end of each reporting period and at the date of settlement, with any changes in fair value recognized in profit or loss for the period.

label: Components of fund [axis]
definition: Represents information pertaining to components of fund.

label: Components of fund [member]
definition: Represents information pertaining to type of components of fund.

label: Computer software and hardware
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the programmes and other operating information used by a computer and the machines, wiring, and other physical components of a computer or other electronic system.

label: Consolidation reserve
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

label: Consolidation reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the difference between the cost of acquisition and the nominal value of the share capital and reserves acquired.

label: Construction contract costs
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of contract revenue and contract costs associated with the construction contract shall be recognized as revenue and expenses respectively by reference to the stage of completion of the contract activity at the end of the reporting period, when the outcome of a construction contract can be estimated reliably.

label: Consumable biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of consumable biological assets.

label: Contribution of zakat
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the zakat contribution during the reporting period. Zakat is a payment made annually under Islamic law on certain kinds of property and used for charitable and religious purposes.

label: Contributions or donations by foreign contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by foreign contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from foreign contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions or donations by local contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by local contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from local contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions or donations by unknown contributor
label_normalized: contributions or donations by unknown contributor
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the donations received from unknown contributors. Donations are things given to a charity, especially a sum of money.

label: Contributions to subsidiaries, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: contributions to subsidiaries, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contributions to subsidiaries which are amounts that entity does not expect repayment in the foreseeable future and are considered as part of the entity’s investment in the subsidiaries.

label: Cost of inventories
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the inventories that were sold, where the carrying amount of those inventories shall be recognized as expenses in the period in which the related revenue are recognized.

label: Biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of current portion of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

label: Cash-settled share-based payment liability
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of goods or services acquired and the liability incurred at the fair value of the liability. Until the liability is settled, the entity shall remeasure the fair value of the liability at the end of each reporting period and at the date of settlement, with any changes in fair value recognized in profit or loss for the period.

label: Defined benefit plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

label: Defined contribution plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

label: Current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
label_normalized: current derivative financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

label: Other current derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other current derivatives financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

label: Current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss
label_normalized: current derivative financial liabilities at fair value through profit or loss
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

label: Other derivatives
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of other derivatives at fair value through profit or loss not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other derivatives
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other derivatives used for hedging not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

label: Current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging
label_normalized: current derivative financial liabilities used for hedging
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current derivatives used for hedging.

label: Employment termination benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of termination benefits which are employee benefits payable as a result of either a. an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment      before the normal retirement date or b. an employee’s decision to accept an offer of benefits in      exchange for the termination of employment.

label: Lease liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of present value of the lease payments that are not paid at that date.

label: Accruals
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of expenses that have been incurred but are not yet recorded in the accounts.

label: Deferred income
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of advance payments for products or services that are to be delivered in the future.

label: Deposits and advanced billings
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of returnable sums payable on the hire or rental of something, to cover possible loss or damage.

label: Dividend payable
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of dividend payables.Dividend is the distribution of a portion of the reporting entity's earnings, decided by the board of directors, to a class of its shareholders.

label: Financing costs
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate current portion of borrowing costs which refers to interest and other costs that an entity incurs in connection with the borrowing of funds.

label: Interest payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of interest payable.Interest is the money paid regularly at a particular rate for the use of money lent, or for delaying the repayment of a debt.

label: Current non-trade payables
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of current non-trade payables.

label: Trade payables due to related parties

definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of current portion of trade payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.A related party is a person or entity that is related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (in this Standard referred to as the ‘reporting entity’).a. A person or a close member of that person’s family is     related to a reporting entity if that person:    I. has control or joint control of the reporting entity;   ii. has significant influence over the reporting entity; or  iii. is a member of the key management personnel of the          reporting entity or of a parent of the reporting entity.b. An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the      following conditions applies:     I. The entity and the reporting entity are members of the         same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary         and fellow subsidiary is related to the others).    ii. One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other          entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of          a group of which the other entity is a member).   iii. Both entities are joint ventures of the same third          party.    iv. One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the          other entity is an associate of the third entity.     v. The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the          benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or          an entity related to the reporting entity. If the          reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring          employers are also related to the reporting entity.    vi. The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a          person identified in (a). vii. A person identified in (a)(I) has significant influence over the entity         or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or         of a parent of the entity).viii. The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides         key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to         the parent of the reporting entity.

definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other market risk not disclosed elsewhere in the list of notes.

label: Disclosure of other notes to accounts [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of other notes to accounts
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other notes to accounts not disclosed anywhere in the list of notes.

label: Disclosure of other reserves [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of other reserves including the capital reserve, translation reserve, hedging reserve, share option reserve, revaluation reserve and other non-distributable reserves.

label: Disclosure of perpetual sukuk [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of perpetual sukuk.

label: Disclosure of post employment benefit obligation [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of post employment benefit obligation
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of post employment benefit obligation.

label: Disclosure of price risk [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of price risk.

label: Disclosure of prior year adjustments [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of prior year adjustments.

label: Disclosure of profit after tax [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of profit after tax.

label: Disclosure of profit before tax [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of profit before tax.

label: Disclosure of progress billings and others [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of progress billings and others
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of progress billings and others.

label: Disclosure of property development costs [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of property development costs.

label: Disclosure of short term investments [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of short term investments.

label: Disclosure of significant events during the financial year [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of significant events during the financial year
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of significant events during the financial year.

label: Disclosure of related party transactions and balances [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of related party transactions and balances
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of related party disclosures such as transactions between immediate holding company, subsidiaries, associates, management entity, key management personnel, transactions with directors and their close family members and remuneration of directors and key management personnel.

label: Disclosure of statement of compliance [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of statement of compliance.

label: Disclosure of supplementary financial information on the breakdown of realised and unrealised profits or losses [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of supplementary financial information on the breakdown of realised and unrealised profits or losses
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of supplementary financial information on the breakdown of realised and unrealised profits or losses (note: this information is not prepared based on MFRS framework, and hence, should not be included as part of the financial statements).

label: Disclosure of tax supplementary information [text block]
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of tax supplementary information.

label: Disclosure of trade and other inventories [text block]
label_normalized: disclosure of trade and other inventories
definition: Represents information pertaining to disclosure of trade and other inventories.

label: Distributable reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of distributable reserves.

label: Dividend income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of dividend incomes from related parties, which refers to distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital.

label: Dividend payable to non-controlling interest
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of dividend payable to non-controlling interests.Dividend is the distribution of a portion of the reporting entity's earnings, decided by the board of directors, to a class of its shareholders.

label: Dividends received
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from dividends which are distributions of profits to holders of equity investments in proportion to their holdings of a particular class of capital which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Employee benefits expense
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of employee benefits expenses which refers to all forms of consideration given by an entity in exchange for service rendered by employees or for the termination of employment.

label: Share option expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of share option expenses. Share-based payment transaction is a transaction in which the entitya. receives goods or services as consideration for its own equity instruments (including shares or share options), orb. receives goods or services but has no obligation to settle the transaction with the supplier.

label: Employment termination benefits
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of termination benefits which are employee benefits payable as a result of either a. an entity’s decision to terminate an employee’s employment before the normal retirement date or b. an employee’s decision to accept an offer of benefits in exchange for the termination of employment.

label: Equity balance restated
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, of components of equity considered as opening balances after taking into account the impact of changes in accounting policies in current reporting period. Equity is the residual interest in the assets of the entity after deducting all its liabilities.

label: Equity component of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS)
label_normalized: equity component of irredeemable convertible unsecured loan stocks (iculs)
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity component of Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS).Irredeemable Convertible Unsecured Loan Stocks (ICULS) is a type of security that can be used to purchase underlying common shares. It is similar to a warrant except that it is subject to the conversion ratio.

label: Equity component of preference shares
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of shares by whatever name called, which does not entitle the holder thereof to the right to vote at a general meeting or to any right to participate beyond a specified amount in any distribution whether by way of dividend, or on redemption, in a winding up.

label: Equity components of other financial instruments
label_normalized: equity components of other financial instruments
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of equity components of other financial instruments not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Expenditure
definition: Represents information pertaining to amount of expenditure incurred during the reporting date.

label: Explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the reclassification of previous financial statements figures of the entity.If an entity changes the presentation or classification of items in its financial statements, it shall reclassify comparative amounts unless reclassification is impracticable. When an entity reclassifies comparative amounts, it shall disclose (including as at the beginning of the preceding period):a. the nature of the reclassification;b. the amount of each item or class of items that is reclassified; andc. the reason for the reclassification.

label: Explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for the restatement of previous financial statements figures of the entity.An entity shall disclose the following:a. the nature of the prior period error;b. for each prior period presented, to the extent practicable, the     amount of the correction:    i. for each financial statement line item affected; and   ii. if MFRS 133 applies to the entity, for basic and diluted         earnings per share;c. the amount of the correction at the beginning of the earliest    prior period presented; andd. if retrospective restatement is impracticable for a particular      prior period, the circumstances that led to the existence of that      condition and a description of how and from when the error      has been corrected.Financial statements of subsequent periods need not repeat these disclosures.

label: Explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period [textblock]
label_normalized: explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period
definition: Represents information pertaining to explanation of reasons for using longer or shorter reporting period of the entity.An entity shall present a complete set of financial statements (including comparative information) at least annually. When an entity changes the end of its reporting period and presents financial statements for a period longer or shorter than one year, an entity shall disclose, in addition to the period covered by the financial statements:a. the reason for using a longer or shorter period, andb. the fact that amounts presented in the financial statements     are not entirely comparable.

label: Fair valuation gain (loss) arising from distribution of non-cash assets to owners
label_normalized: fair valuation gain (loss) arising from distribution of non-cash assets to owners
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the difference, if any, between the carrying amount of the assets distributed and the carrying amount of the dividend payable in profit or loss when entities settle the dividend payable .

label: Fair value reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the fair value reserves.Fair value is the price that would be received to sellan asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date.

label: Net fair value gain on recycle of forex reserve upon disposal of subsidiaries
label_normalized: net fair value gain on recycle of forex reserve upon disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net fair value gain on recycle of forex reserve upon disposal of subsidiaries, which refers to , the cumulative amount of the exchange differences relating to foreign operation on disposal, recognized in other comprehensive income and accumulated in the separate component of equity, shall be reclassified from equity to profit or loss (as a reclassification adjustment) when the gain or loss on disposal is recognized.

label: Fair value reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of fair value reserves.Fair value is the price that would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date.

label: Fixed deposits with financial institutions
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of fixed deposits with financial institutions.

label: Foreign currency translation reserve [member]
definition: This member stands for a component of equity representing the amount that comprises all foreign currency differences arising from the translation of the financial statements of subsidiaries whose functional currencies are different from that of the Company’s functional currency as well as foreign currency differences arising from the translation of monetary items that are considered to form part of a net investment in a foreign operation.

label: Freehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of freehold land. Freehold lands are assets where there is free ownership for perpectuaty and of which there are no restriction of transfer to the absolute title of the property.

label: Gain on disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal of associates. An associate is an entity over which the investor has significant influence.

label: Gain on disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: gain on disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal of joint ventures. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

label: Gain on disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal of subsidiaries. Subsidiary is an entity that is controlled by another entity.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of associates to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: (gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of joint ventures to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Gain on disposal of other investments
label_normalized: gain on disposal of other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of other investments to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: (Gain) loss on disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of (gain) loss on disposal of subsidiaries to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Gain on disposal from other investments
label_normalized: gain on disposal from other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the gain on disposal from other investments. An interest in another entity refers to contractual and non-contractual involvement that exposes an entity to variability of returns from the performance of the other entity. An interest in another entity can be evidenced by, but is not limited to, the holding of equity or debt instruments as well as other forms of involvement such as the provision of funding, liquidity support, credit enhancement and guarantees.

label: Gain from disposal of a subsidiary, joint ventures and associates
label_normalized: gain from disposal of a subsidiary, joint ventures and associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of gain on disposal of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates.

label: Gains on foreign exchange
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of sum of gain on foreign exchange.

label: Grant or incentives by foreign government or it's agencies
label_normalized: grant or incentives by foreign government or it's agencies
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of foreign government grants or incentives received. These are assistance by government in the form of transfers of resources to an entity in return for past or future compliance with certain conditions relating to the operating activities of the entity. They exclude those forms of government assistance which cannot reasonably have a value placed upon them and transactions with government which cannot be distinguished from the normal trading transactions of the entity.

label: Grant or incentives by Malaysian government or it's agencies
label_normalized: grant or incentives by malaysian government or it's agencies
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of Malaysian government grants or incentives received. These are assistance by government in the form of transfers of resources to an entity in return for past or future compliance with certain conditions relating to the operating activities of the entity. They exclude those forms of government assistance which cannot reasonably have a value placed upon them and transactions with government which cannot be distinguished from the normal trading transactions of the entity.

label: Growing cane
definition: Represents information pertaining to growing canes biological assets.

label: Head office accounts
definition: Represents information pertaining to amount of head office account as at the reporting date.

label: Head office accounts
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of head office accounts.Head office is the principal office of a business organization, constituting the center for administration and policymaking.

label: Impact of changes in accounting policies
label_normalized: impact of changes in accounting policies
definition: Report the value, as for the reporting period, of impact of changes in accounting policies. An entity shall present a statement of changes in equity as required. The statement of changes in equity includes each component of equity, the effects of retrospective application or retrospective restatement recognised in accordance with MFRS 108.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in subsidiaries
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment in subsidiaries recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in associates
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment in associates recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in joint ventures
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of investment in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment in joint ventures recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of prepaid lease rentals
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of prepaid lease rentals
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on prepaid lease rentals recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of other financial assets or receivables
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of other financial assets or receivables
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment in other financial assests or receivables recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Impairment (reversal of impairment) of other investments
label_normalized: impairment (reversal of impairment) of other investments
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of adjustments for impairment loss (reversal of impairment loss) on investment in other investments not reported elsewhere in the statement recognised in profit or loss to reconcile profit (loss) to net cash flow from (used in) operating activities.

label: Management fees
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of income earned from management fees which is the fee received for managing a business, property, sum of money, etc. on another's behalf.

label: Other transactions, change in fund and reserves
label_normalized: other transactions, change in fund and reserves
definition: Represents information pertaining to increase (decrease) through transfers and other changes in fund during the reporting period.

label: Infrastructure and site facilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of the basic physical and organizational structures and facilities (e.g. buildings, roads, power supplies) needed for the operation of a society or enterprise and places, amenities, or pieces of equipment provided for a particular purpose.

label: Finance income due from related parties
label_normalized: finance income due from related parties
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of finance income due from related parties which are interest earned from related parties.A related party is a person or entity that is related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (in this Standard referred to as the ‘reporting entity’).a. A person or a close member of that person’s family is related to a reporting entity if that person:i. has control or joint control of the reporting entity;ii. has significant influence over the reporting entity; oriii. is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity; or of a parent of the reporting entity.b. An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the following conditions applies:i. The entity and the reporting entity are members of the same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary and fellow subsidiary is related to the others).ii. One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of a group of which the other entity is a member).iii. Both entities are joint ventures of the same third party.iv. One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the other entity is an associate of the third entity.v. The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or an entity related to the reporting entity. If the reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring employers are also related to the reporting entity.vi. The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a person identified in (a).vii. A person identified in (a)(I) has significant influence over the entity or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or of a parent of the entity).viii. The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to the parent of the reporting entity.

label: Interest income
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of interest income from related parties, which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity.

label: Interest received
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of cash receipts from interest which are charges for the use of cash or cash equivalents or amounts due to the entity which shall be presented separately and classified as financing activities.

label: Fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
label_normalized: fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates related to fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee.

label: Quoted shares in Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

label: Quoted shares outside Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

label: Unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares outside malaysia, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Unrealised profit on transactions with associates
label_normalized: unrealised profit on transactions with associates
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates related to contributions that lack commercial substance.

label: Fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
label_normalized: fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures related to fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee.

label: Quoted shares in Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

label: Quoted shares outside Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

label: Unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares outside malaysia, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
label_normalized: fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries related to fair value adjustments on loans and advances and financial guarantee.

label: Quoted other financial assets in Malaysia
label_normalized: quoted other financial assets in malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Quoted other financial assets outside Malaysia
label_normalized: quoted other financial assets outside malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries of other quoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Quoted shares in Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries quoted or listed on a stock exchange in Malaysia.

label: Quoted shares outside Malaysia
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Unquoted other financial assets in Malaysia, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted other financial assets in malaysia, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets in Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Unquoted other financial assets outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted other financial assets outside malaysia, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment of other unquoted financial assets outside Malaysia not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange.

label: Unquoted shares outside Malaysia, net of impairment losses
label_normalized: unquoted shares outside malaysia, net of impairment losses
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in subsidiaries, net of impairment not quoted or listed on a stock exchange outside Malaysia.

label: Building under construction
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of building under construction. If an entity determines that the fair value of an investment property under construction is not reliably measurable but expects the fair value of the property to be reliably measurable when construction is complete, it shall measure that investment property under construction at cost until either its fair value becomes reliably measurable or construction is completed (whichever is earlier).

label: Freehold land and building
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of freehold land and building. Freehold land and building are assets where there is free ownership for perpectuaty and of which there are no restriction of transfer to the absolute title of the property.

label: Leasehold land and building
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of leasehold land and building. Leasehold land and buildings are assets contracted under an agreement whereby the rights to use the assets are given for an agreed period of time in exchange for consideration.

label: Other investments in associates
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other investments in associates not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Share of post-acquisition profits and reserves
label_normalized: share of post-acquisition profits and reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in associates related to the investor’s share of profit or loss of the investee after the date of acquisition.

label: Other investments in joint ventures
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other investments in joint ventures not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Share of post-acquisition profits and reserves
label_normalized: share of post-acquisition profits and reserves
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures related to investor’s share of profit or loss of the investee after the date of acquisition.

label: Unrealised profit on transactions with joint ventures
label_normalized: unrealised profit on transactions with joint ventures
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of investments in joint ventures related to contributions that lack commercial substance.

label: Other investments in subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other investments in subsidiaries not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Leased properties
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of contracts which is, or contains, a lease if the contract conveys the right to control the use of an identified asset for a period of time in exchange for consideration.

label: Liabilities other than liabilities held for sale
label_normalized: liabilities other than liabilities held for sale
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of liabilities other than liabilities held for sale held by the reporting entity.

label: Livestock
definition: Represents information pertaining to livestock biological assets.

label: Loans from non-controlling interest
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of loan from non-controlling interests for a specific amount that has a specified repayment schedule and a fixed or floating interest rate.

label: Long term leasehold land
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of land held on long lease being a lease with an unexpired period of fifty years or more.

label: Loss on disposal of associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the loss on disposal of associates. An associate is an entity over which the investor has significant influence.

label: Loss on disposal of joint ventures
label_normalized: loss on disposal of joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the loss on disposal of joint ventures. A joint venture is a joint arrangement whereby the parties that have joint control of the arrangement have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.

label: Loss on disposal of subsidiaries
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of the loss on disposal of subsidiaries. Subsidiary is an entity that is controlled by another entity.

label: Loss on disposal of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates
label_normalized: loss on disposal of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, the  sum of loss on disposal of subsidiaries, joint ventures and associates disposed.

label: Membership fees
definition: Represents information pertaining to membership fees during the reporting period.

label: Other assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other non-current assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Other receivables due from other related companies
label_normalized: other receivables due from other related companies
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current amount of other receivables due from other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Miscellaneous payables due to non-controlling interests
label_normalized: miscellaneous payables due to non-controlling interests
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of miscellaneous payables due to non-controlling interests not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Natural disaster related expenses
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of expenses incurred due to natural disaster which is a natural event such as a flood, earthquake, or hurricane that causes great damage or loss of life.

label: Net deposits recognised
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net deposits recognized which are cash receipts and payments for the acceptance and repayment of deposits with a fixed maturity date and the placement of deposits with and withdrawal of deposits from other financial institutions.

label: Net repayment from associates
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net repayment from associates, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Net repayment from joint ventures
definition: Report the value, for the reporting period, of net repayment from joint ventures, which shall be presented separately and classified as investing activities.

label: Biological assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate amount of non-current portion of biological assets which consist of living animals and/or plants.

label: Cash-settled share-based payment liability
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of goods or services acquired and the liability incurred at the fair value of the liability. Until the liability is settled, the entity shall remeasure the fair value of the liability at the end of each reporting period and at the date of settlement, with any changes in fair value recognized in profit or loss for the period.

label: Defined benefit plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of post-employment benefit plans other than defined contribution plans.

label: Defined contribution plan
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of post-employment benefit plans under which an entity pays fixed contributions into a separate entity (a fund) and will have no legal or constructive obligation to pay further contributions if the fund does not hold sufficient assets to pay all employee benefits relating to employee service in the current and prior periods.

label: Non-current derivatives financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
label_normalized: non-current derivatives financial assets at fair value through profit or loss
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the sum of non-current derivative at fair value through profit or loss.

label: Forward contract
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of forward contracts. A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

label: Other non-current derivative financial assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of other non-current derivatives financial assets not reported elsewhere in the categories above.

label: Swap
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate non-current portion of swap. A swap is a derivative contract through which two parties exchange financial instruments.

label: Options
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of option contracts. Option contract is an agreement between two parties to facilitate a potential transaction on the underlying security at a preset price, referred to as the strike price, prior to the expiration date. The two types of contracts are put and call options, which can be purchased to speculate on the direction of stocks or stock indices, or sold to generate income.

label: Forward contract

A forward contract is a customized contract between two parties to buy or sell an asset at a specified price on a future date that can be used for hedging or speculation. A forward contract settlement can occur on a cash or delivery basis.

label: Service concession assets
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of infrastructure items to which the operator is given access by the grantor for the purposes of the  service arrangement are not recognized as property, plant and equipment of the operator. The grantor may also provide other items to the operator that the operator can keep or deal with as it wishes. If such assets form part of the consideration payable by the grantor for the services, they are not government grants as defined in MFRS 120. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition.

label: Service concession liabilities
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of infrastructure items to which the operator is given access by the grantor for the purposes of service arrangement are not recognized as property, plant and equipment of the operator. The grantor may also provide other items to the operator that the operator can keep or deal with as it wishes. If such assets form part of the consideration payable by the grantor for the services, they are not government grants. They are recognized as assets of the operator, measured at fair value on initial recognition. The operator shall recognize a liability in respect of unfulfilled obligations it has assumed in exchange for the assets.

label: Trade payables due to related parties
label_normalized: trade payables due to related parties
definition: Report the value, as at the reporting date, the aggregate of non-current portion of trade payables due to other related parties not reported elsewhere in the categories above.A related party is a person or entity that is related to the entity that is preparing its financial statements (in this Standard referred to as the ‘reporting entity’).a. A person or a close member of that person’s family is related to a reporting entity if that person:I. has control or joint control of the reporting entity;ii. has significant influence over the reporting entity; oriii. is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity or of a parent of the reporting entity.b. An entity is related to a reporting entity if any of the following conditions applies:I. The entity and the reporting entity are members of the same group (which means that each parent, subsidiary and fellow subsidiary is related to the others).ii. One entity is an associate or joint venture of the other entity (or an associate or joint venture of a member of a group of which the other entity is a member).iii. Both entities are joint ventures of the same third party.iv. One entity is a joint venture of a third entity and the other entity is an associate of the third entity.v. The entity is a post-employment benefit plan for the benefit of employees of either the reporting entity or an entity related to the reporting entity. If the reporting entity is itself such a plan, the sponsoring employers are also related to the reporting entity.vi. The entity is controlled or jointly controlled by a person identified in (a).vii. A person identified in (a)(I) has significant influence over the entity or is a member of the key management personnel of the entity (or of a parent of the entity).viii. The entity, or any member of a group of which it is a part, provides key management personnel services to the reporting entity or to the parent of the reporting entity.
